items.notes: Displays an icon and title header on a Child form. Use it to identify the form with a recognizable icon and descriptive title.
items.name: Form header

items.notes: Adds a standard bottom spacer on a Normal form. Use it to ensure consistent visual padding at the bottom of the form layout.
items.name: Form footer

items.notes: Displays an icon and title header on a Normal form. Use it to identify the form with a recognizable icon and descriptive title.
items.name: Form header

items.notes: Adds a standard bottom spacer on a Child form. Use it to ensure consistent visual padding at the bottom of the form layout.
items.name: Form footer

items.notes: Displays a full-width styled banner message on a Child form. Use it to communicate feedback, warnings, errors, or informational text to the user.
items.name: Alert

items.notes: Displays a labelled list of name-value pairs on a Child form. Use it to present structured data with configurable column widths for names and values.
items.name: Name-value list

items.notes: Displays a date input with date picker on a Child form. Use it to capture a date value with configurable label, placeholder and required state.
items.name: Date

items.notes: Displays a group of checkboxes on a Child form. Use it to capture multiple boolean selections from a predefined list, with configurable label, layout columns and required state.
items.name: Checkboxes

items.notes: Displays a searchable data grid on a Normal form. Use it to present and select records, with configurable label, grid id, height, required state and conditional row visibility.
items.name: Grid

items.notes: Displays a searchable data grid with two configurable action buttons on a Normal form. Use it when grid interaction requires inline actions with conditional visibility and disabled states.
items.name: Grid + buttons

items.notes: Displays a searchable data grid on a Child form. Use it to present and select records, with configurable label, grid id, height and required state.
items.name: Grid

items.notes: Displays a complete dashboard with title, search, navigation and panel on a Normal form. Use it as the main landing interface to start apps.
items.name: Dashboard

items.notes: Displays a complete password reset control on a Child form. Use it to let users set a new password, with configurable label and minimum password length.
items.name: Password reset

items.notes: Displays a complete password reset control on a Normal form. Use it to let users set a new password, with configurable label and minimum password length.
items.name: Password reset

items.notes: Displays two side-by-side searchable grids with drag-and-drop on a Child form. Use it to move items between two lists, with configurable labels, grid ids, key columns, heights and button styles.
items.name: Two-grid DND

items.notes: Displays a group of radio buttons on a Child form. Use it to capture a single selection from a predefined list, with configurable label, values, initial value and required state.
items.name: Radio buttons

items.notes: Displays a set of 5 navigation tab buttons on a Normal form. Use it to link related forms as a tab group, with each tab's label, icon, color and styles configurable.
items.name: Tab-set 5

items.notes: Displays a searchable data grid with multi-view control on a Normal form. Use it when the grid depends on a controlling selection, with configurable grid ids, height and required state.
items.name: Grid + control

items.notes: Displays a dropdown selector on a Normal form. Use it to capture a single selection from a list, with configurable label, values, column width, required state and conditional visibility.
items.name: Dropdown

items.notes: Displays a Cancel button and up to two configurable action buttons on a Child form. Use it for form submission controls with configurable label, style, icon, visibility and enabled state.
items.name: Button-set cancel+action

items.notes: Displays a text input field on a Child form. Use it to capture free text with configurable label, placeholder, validation rules and optional password or email mode.
items.name: Input text

items.notes: Displays a text input field on a Normal form. Use it to capture free text with configurable label, placeholder, validation rules and optional password or email mode.
items.name: Input text

items.notes: Displays a full-width styled banner message on a Normal form. Use it to communicate feedback, warnings, errors, or informational text to the user.
items.name: Alert

items.notes: Displays a group of checkboxes on a Normal form. Use it to capture multiple boolean selections from a predefined list, with configurable label, layout columns and required state.
items.name: Checkboxes

items.name: Date

items.name: Dropdown

items.name: Name-value list

items.notes: Displays a group of radio buttons on a Normal form. Use it to capture a single selection from a predefined list, with configurable label, values, initial value and required state.
